sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Borussia Dortmund are in exceptional form, winning all of their last 5 matches with an average of 3.4 goals scored per game. Holstein Kiel, on the other hand, have had mixed results with 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses in their last 5 matches, averaging 2 goals per game.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, results have been split with Dortmund dominating historically (5-0 in 2021) and Holstein Kiel pulling off a surprising 4-2 win in January 2025. Both matches saw high-scoring encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Dortmund rank 5th in the Bundesliga with 68 goals scored (3rd in the league), while Holstein Kiel struggle in 17th place, conceding 77 goals (worst in the league). Dortmund's superior possession (58.8%) and attacking stats give them a clear edge.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Serhou Guirassy (8 goals in last 5 matches) is in top form for Dortmund, supported by Julian Brandt's creativity. For Kiel, Shuto Machino and Alexander Bernhardsson have been threats with 4 goals each in recent games.

sections.subtitle: Match Context
sections.text: Playing at home in Signal Iduna Park, Dortmund are favored given their recent form and historical dominance at home. Kiel's defensive vulnerabilities and lack of clean sheets (10 games without one) suggest a likely struggle.
